_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 500

observed.note: brown r1, blue r2, green r3, red (clamped) r4+. 29.1% at 3000 runs (872/3000); ~28-29% across trials at higher N (27.9% over 12000). Deaths split boss/room (~1505 boss / ~623 room per 3000), never 0/100%. Red owns realm 4+, which selfplay shows is the whole decisive game, so its step over green had to be gentle (armor untouched everywhere; +1 HP/grade plus +1 agility on striker+boss, +1 boss crit). A full notch (flat +1 str on striker+boss) measured ~24% — under the 25% floor — so it was rejected. Sits a clean ~4pt step below the ~33% green baseline, mirroring blue->green.
